app.title: agentboard
app.offline: Agentboard server unreachable. Run `/agentboard:open` in Claude Code.

common.confirm_delete: Delete task {{code}}? Any running agents will be cancelled.

settings.title: Project settings
settings.name: Name
settings.code_locked: Immutable — task codes + DB filename locked to this value
settings.repo_hint: Absolute path. Worker edits files under this directory.
settings.max_parallel_hint: 1–3. Concurrent agent runs for this project.
settings.version_mismatch: Project was modified elsewhere — reload and retry.

wizard.name: Project name
wizard.code_hint: 2–7 uppercase letters/digits. Each task will be prefixed with this code (e.g. {{code}}-1).
wizard.wf1: Todo → Agent Working → Agent Review → Human Approval → Done
wizard.wf2: Todo → Agent Working → Human Approval → Done
wizard.repo_hint: Absolute path to the code repo the Worker agent will edit.

task.title: Title
task.reject_prompt: Tell Worker what to change (min 10 chars)
